overview.description: The United States Brent Oil Fund LP (BNO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in crude oil commodities. The fund tracks the Brent oil spot price using near-month ICE futures contracts. BNO was launched on Jun 2, 2010 and is issued by Marygold.

data.title: It could take 6-10 weeks for things to return to normal after Hormuz reopens: Dan Pickering
data.text: Dan Pickering, CIO of Pickering Energy Partners, discusses his outlook on the oil market ahead of the signing of the U.S.-Iran deal to end the war, and why it's unlikely that oil will fall to the $60 ...

data.title: Oil drifts lower as Strait of Hormuz reopens, focus shifts to demand outlook
data.text: Oil prices steadied as markets weighed the interim U.S.-Iran agreement. Shipping through the Strait of Hormuz showed signs of recovery.

data.title: Oil falls as supply starts moving through Strait of Hormuz
data.text: Oil prices fell on Friday on the prospect of more supply returning to the market after oil tankers began to move through the ​Strait of Hormuz following the signing of the U.S.-Iran interim peace deal...

data.title: Oil Falls on Signs of Strait of Hormuz's Reopening
data.text: Oil fell in early Asian trade on signs of a reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, a critical channel through which one-fifth of the world's oil is typically transported.

data.title: With the planned reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, the specter of a prolonged crunch in energy supplies has faded—but the disruption could take months to unwind
data.text: The specter of a prolonged crunch in energy supplies has faded, but the disruption could take months to unwind.

data.title: Thursday's Final Takeaways: Fed Pauses Rates & Oil Prices Slide
data.text: Marley Kayden talks about the FOMC's decision to hold interest rates steady in Kevin Warsh's first meeting as Fed Chair. Meanwhile, crude oil prices slid after the U.S. and Iran signed a memorandum of...

data.title: Crude Oil Price Forecast: Will 200-Day Support Hold?
data.text: Crude oil tests 200-day moving average support after a symmetrical triangle breakdown, with price action now determining whether a rebound develops or deeper downside continues.

data.title: Oil Prices Fall To 3-Month Lows On U.S.-Iran Deal
data.text: Oil prices fell to three-month lows on Thursday after the U.S. and Iran signalled that a long awaited deal to end hostilities in Middle East had been signed.

data.title: Oil prices slide near pre-Iran war levels – but it could take months for gasoline to fully drop
data.text: Oil prices fell about 10% this week to their lowest levels since the war in Iran started after President Trump signed a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

data.title: The Iran oil shock taught traders these key lessons about demand and China
data.text: Global oil prices on Thursday touched their lowest level since the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran began almost four months ago. That marks a drop of more than 30% from their May peak and likely averts the...

data.title: Natural Gas, WTI Oil, Brent Oil Forecasts – Oil Markets Attempt To Rebound After Multi-Day Sell-Off
data.text: Oil markets are moving higher as some traders are ready to buy the dip.

data.title: Oil markets are overshooting to the downside, says Abaxx Markets' Jeff Currie
data.text: Jeff Currie, Abaxx Markets executive co-chairman, joins 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss how much lower oil prices can go, the company's around the energy sector and much more.

data.title: SHOCK DROP: Oil prices TUMBLE faster than many expected
data.text: 'The Big Money Show' panel discusses how President Donald Trump's Iran framework helped send oil prices lower, gas below $4 a gallon and stocks higher as investors bet the conflict is easing.

data.title: OPEC chief dismisses IEA supply glut forecast as 'critical' Strait of Hormuz reopens
data.text: OPEC chief Haitham al-Ghais sat down for an exclusive interview with CNBC on Wednesday. He dismissed the IEA's claim of a supply glut brewing in oil markets for 2027.

data.title: Oil flows through Hormuz will take time to recover, banks say
data.text: A recovery in oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz and oil production following the U.S.-Iran interim peace ​deal will take time, potentially several months, analysts at ‌two banks said.

data.title: OPEC Sees Oil Demand Growing With No Peak In Sight
data.text: The cartel forecast demand to grow by 19 million barrels a day to around 124 million barrels a day in 2050, driven by road transportation, aviation and petrochemicals.

data.title: Gas prices fall below $4 per gallon as oil supply fears ease after Iran deal
data.text: Drivers in the U.S. paid $3.99 on average, the first time prices have fallen below $4 since March 30, according to data shared by AAA. Prices have fallen the past 28 days in a row after peaking at $4....

data.title: OPEC sticks to robust oil demand outlook, sees no peak to 2050
data.text: OPEC maintained its forecast for robust global oil demand growth ​in the next four years on Thursday and nudged up its longer-term view, citing a worldwide shift towards ‌more supportive policies for ...

data.text: Some oil and gas vessels have begun to cross the Strait of Hormuz, including ships owned by Saudi Arabia's state tanker giant. The movement of Saudi ships through the waterway marks the first large vo...

data.text: One month-plus into the truce, supply-demand dynamics dominate as US production stays robust. WTI slides to $74.02 after triangle violation, Brent defends $77.74 support, and Natural Gas trades at $3....

data.title: Oil Prices Fall After Trump Signs Iran Peace Deal, Strait of Hormuz to Open
data.text: Brent crude and WTI were dropping after the signing of the U.S.-Iran peace deal, with markets focusing on the prospect for a swift reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.
